text: Introducing argo preview. After your first pipeline run, open a browser-based viewer to iterate on voiceover, overlays, and timing — without re-recording a single frame.
Your recorded video plays right in the browser, with aligned audio synced to the timeline. Scrub anywhere to jump to any moment.
Every scene from your demo appears in the sidebar. Click any scene card to jump directly to it. The active scene highlights automatically as the video plays.
Edit voiceover text right in the browser. Change a word, rephrase a sentence, fix pronunciation. Your edits save directly to the voiceover manifest file.
Swap overlay templates and zones with simple dropdowns. Switch from a lower-third to a headline card, move it from bottom center to top right — all live.
Hit Regen tee tee ess on any scene to regenerate just that clip. No need to re-run the entire pipeline for a single word change. Surgical updates in seconds.
Hit Save and your changes write directly to your voiceover and overlay manifest files on disk. No copy-paste, no manual syncing.
Toggle audio and overlay visibility with checkboxes. Preview the video with or without narration, with or without overlays — however you like.
That's argo preview. Edit, regen, save, repeat — all from your browser. Try it with npx argo preview.
